description.en: Isn't it time to crawl up out of the Crypto swamp? It's a long way from the swamp to the moon. This card commemorates such feelings of despair. Behind Chat emerging from the swamp is a scene with a distant road along which the Cryptos and Crypto rabbit seek to become kings of the moon
description.ja: Crypto沼からそろそろ這い上がるのかな？　沼から月まで遠いよな。という絶望感記念カード。 沼の中から顔を出したチャートの後ろで、Crypto達とCrypto兎が月の王になりたいと、遠い道のりを眺めるシーンが描かれている。
